title: nervilia purpurea
intro: Nervilia purpurea, also known as the 'Purple Nervilia' or 'Voodoo Lily,' is a type of orchid native to tropical forests in Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, Nervilia purpurea is often used in teas, infusions, and topical creams, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
